name: Definitions of MRI Conditions, Filtered Feedthrough Technology, Magnetic Switch Detection, MRI Field Strength, Whole-body SAR, Gradient Slew Rate, Programming and Interrogation, Contraindications for MRI Scanning
description: This term encompasses the definitions of various parameters related to MRI scanning, including MRI conditionality, filtered feedthrough technology, magnetic switch detection, MRI field strength, whole-body SAR, gradient slew rate, programming and interrogation, and contraindications for MRI scanning. These definitions are crucial for understanding the operation and safety of MRI machines.
